name: io.github.billetkit/billetkit-voice-grader
description: AI-slop detection + 2026 anti-tell voice grading. Drop in front of any LLM that produces customer-facing prose. Two tools: ai_slop_score (Pangram/GPTZero simulator) and voice_grade (strict anti-tell rubric).

environment_variables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Anthropic API key for Haiku-class inference. Either this or OLLAMA_BASE_URL is required.

environment_variables.name: OLLAMA_BASE_URL
environment_variables.description: URL of local Ollama (e.g. http://localhost:11434). Alternative to ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for free local inference.
